design_elements: large rose emerging from clouds graphic on front center
consensus.overall_description: A dark forest green pullover hoodie featuring a prominent white and black graphic of a rose blooming from clouds on the front center. The hoodie has a classic construction with a kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs and hem.
patches: Small rectangular woven tag on the right sleeve cuff.
consensus.stitching_details: standard seam construction, ribbed knit trim at cuffs and hem

claude: large rose emerging from clouds graphic on front center
gemini: Large embroidered graphic on the center chest depicting two roses with thorny stems emerging from a cloud.

values.claude: A dark forest green pullover hoodie featuring a prominent white and black graphic of a rose blooming from clouds on the front center. The hoodie has a classic construction with a kangaroo pocket, drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs and hem.
values.gemini: A charcoal grey pullover hoodie featuring a large, intricately embroidered graphic of two roses emerging from a cloud on the center chest. The garment is constructed with a kangaroo pocket, ribbed cuffs, and a drawstring hood.

gemini: Small rectangular woven tag on the right sleeve cuff.
